home_description_line3: and a keen interest in Art.
about_p1: My name is Guido Bertaina, I’m 36 years old and originally from Argentina. From an early age, I developed a strong curiosity for learning and exploring different fields, which eventually led me to earn a Law degree after high school.
about_p2: Traveling has been a defining part of my life. I’ve visited more than 65 countries and have had the opportunity to live in some of them — including Dublin (Ireland), Stockholm (Sweden), Copenhagen (Denmark), and Turin (Italy).
about_p3: I hold a Master’s in Administrative Law, for which I defended a thesis titled “Project of Urgent Health Process in the Province of Buenos Aires.”
about_p4: In 2022, I settled permanently in Stockholm and began my journey as a Software Developer. What once started as a personal interest has evolved into a full professional pursuit.
about_p5: I remain deeply passionate about technology and continuous learning — always exploring new tools, frameworks, and architectures, and taking on challenges that drive both personal and professional growth.
exp_2011_desc: I started my career in the Judiciary in an entry-level role and progressively worked as a mediator for employment cases over eight years.
exp_2013_desc: Graduated with a Law degree from the National University of La Matanza, Buenos Aires, Argentina.
exp_2015_desc: Completed a two-year Master's program in Administrative Law at Austral University, Buenos Aires, Argentina.
exp_2018_desc: Started studying Art Curation at the National University of the Arts, Buenos Aires, Argentina (program unfinished).
exp_2022_desc: Graduated from the Fullstack .NET Bootcamp in Fall 2022 at </Salt>, Stockholm, Sweden.
exp_2023_desc: Began my professional journey as a software developer at Byggdagboken in Ljusdal, Sweden.
exp_future_desc: Continuously exploring modern tools, frameworks, and architectures while expanding my skills.
cookie_text: This website uses cookies for analytics and to improve user experience.
